## CreateCompanyInput variable

Zod schema for creating a new company. Omits system-generated fields (id, timestamps).

**Signature:**

```typescript
CreateCompanyInput: z.ZodObject<
	{} & {
		name: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>
		email: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Email'>>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		name: string & z.BRAND<'Name'>
		email: string & z.BRAND<'Email'>
	},
	{
		name: string
		email: string
	}
>
```
